headache and nausea.description: Severe head pain often triggered by light, fasting, or stress, frequently includes nausea and sensitivity to light.
Mild to moderate pain from stress or posture, sometimes includes nausea.
Caused by contaminated food, often includes nausea, vomiting, and headache.

burning while urinating.description: A bacterial infection causing painful urination, frequent urges, and cloudy urine.
Bladder inflammation often caused by infection, leading to pain and urgency.
May cause irritation or mild discomfort but not typically burning urination.

sore throat and fever.description: A bacterial infection with sore throat, fever, and swollen lymph nodes.
A viral infection with sore throat, runny nose, and mild fever.
Inflammation of the tonsils causing throat pain and fever.

frequent urination.description: High blood sugar may cause excessive urination and thirst.
Frequent urination with burning sensation often indicates a UTI.

diarrhea and stomach pain.description: Infection of the stomach or intestines, causing diarrhea and cramping.
Ingesting contaminated food, leading to diarrhea, nausea, and vomiting.

joint stiffness in the morning.description: An autoimmune condition causing morning stiffness and joint swelling.
Wear-and-tear arthritis that causes stiffness after rest.

itchy skin and rashes.description: An immune response to allergens causing skin irritation.
A chronic skin condition with inflammation and itchiness.

shortness of breath and chest pain.description: Serious cardiac event, seek emergency care immediately.
Sudden anxiety leading to chest tightness and shortness of breath.
